## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Saskia's experience and qualifications for the Content Manager role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Saskia has diverse experience in SEO, content creation, and team management](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX's content process involves AI-assisted workflows with human editing](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [The role focuses on editing, quality control, and content optimization](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Work-life balance and flexibility are emphasized at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=1932.0)

## Topics

### Saskia's Professional Background

  - [Studied strategic brand communication](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [1.5 years as SEO expert (technical and on-page)](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Content creator for two companies, managed team of 5](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Currently writing SEO-optimized blogs for various companies](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Experience with proprietary AI tools for content research](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)

### Content Creation Process and Skills

  - [Thorough research aligned with keywords and search intent](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Emphasis on proofreading, keyword placement, and audience perspective](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Experience editing AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Focus on accuracy, scannability, and grammar](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Familiar with "bottom line up front" principle](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [Strong SEO background (on-page, technical, analytics)](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### GrowthX's Content Workflow

  - [AI generates outlines and drafts](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Content managers review, edit, and optimize](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Focus on editing rather than writing from scratch](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Collaboration with other teams (e.g., software engineers)](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Use of Airtable for content calendar management](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Looker Studio for performance reporting](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)

### Role Expectations and Company Culture

  - [Editing 7-8 articles per week per client (varies with length)](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Keyword research and content opportunity identification](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Client feedback implementation and proactive improvements](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Flexible work hours with focus on goals rather than time tracking](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=1932.0)
  - [Unlimited PTO policy with recommended 4 weeks minimum](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=2094.0)
  - [Emphasis on work-life balance and open communication](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=2072.0)

### Success Factors for the Role

  - [Caring about content quality and client reputation](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=2244.0)
  - [Proactive communication about issues or improvements](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=2254.0)
  - [Balancing AI assistance with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
  - [Attention to detail and organization skills](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Saskia to have a follow-up interview with Marilla](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=2335.0)
  - [GrowthX team to review Saskia's candidacy](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=2335.0)
  - [Feedback to be provided to Saskia within a week](https://fathom.video/share/i4b2181CeKsD_JYMZVKx4FcwC7RKJED9?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
